About Your Coach

CHASE
BOYD

Hey! I'm Chase. A fitness coach with 15+ years of training under my belt and four kids at home. I know what it's like to be exhausted, overwhelmed, and still wanting to show up for yourself.

My coaching is straight-forward: no crazy diets, no 2-hour gym sessions, no judgment. Whether you're a dad who hasn't worked out in years, a total beginner, or someone who just needs a real plan; I've got you. Yes, you can still have pizza, as long as it's tracked.

App Program — $29.99/mo

EVERYTHING YOU NEED TO GET MOVING

💪
Custom Workout Program

A fully structured training plan built around your schedule and goals. No guesswork; just show up and do the work.

🔄
New Workouts Every 4 Weeks

Your program gets fresh workouts every week so your body keeps progressing and you never plateau from doing the same routine.

🥗
Nutrition Guidance

No complicated diets or meal plans. Chase teaches you how to track and manage your calories so you understand exactly what you're eating and why it matters.

📲
Access Via the App

Everything delivered through the Trainerize app; workouts, tracking, messaging. Available on your phone whenever you need it.

🎯
Works for Any Fitness Level

Total beginner or someone returning after years off; this program meets you exactly where you are and scales from there.

💬
Real Coach, Real Support

You're not buying from a robot. Chase is an actual human being who cares about your progress and keeps it real with you.

Who It's For

THIS WAS BUILT
FOR YOU IF...

  • You're a dad with a full-time job and zero time to waste on complicated programs
  • You've tried before and fallen off; you want something sustainable this time
  • You're a total beginner who has no idea where to start
  • You want to lose weight, build muscle, or just feel better in your own body
  • You're tired of feeling tired and want real energy back
  • You want a coach who's straight with you; not someone selling you supplements
  • You don't want to give up the foods you love; just learn balance
  • You're ready to actually commit and do the work, for under $30 a month
